autoImport.description: Import lesson content from a PDF page.
autoImport.noPdfs: No PDFs found in your cloud storage.
autoImport.selectFileToPreviewHint: Choose a PDF from the list to see a preview here.

tableOfContents.title: Table of contents
tableOfContents.description: Jump to a heading in this lesson.

help.title: Lesson Help
help.description: Use these patterns to keep worksheets clear and easy to edit.

structure.title: Start with structure
structure.body: Open with a clear learning goal, then add the short context learners need before the first task. Keep one idea per page so the worksheet stays readable in editor and preview.

headings.title: Use headings for navigation
headings.body: Add headings whenever the topic changes. The menu drawer reads those headings and turns them into a jump list, so descriptive section titles matter more than decorative labels.

media.title: Tag media from cloud storage
media.body: Use the block picker or replace buttons to attach existing cloud files. Store only the storage path on the lesson block and let the UI resolve previews at render time.

pages.title: Split long worksheets into pages
pages.body: Use page breaks when the page becomes too dense. Each page should feel like a printable sheet with one focused section and a clear follow-up task.

toolbar.blocksDescription: Choose the next content block for this page.
toolbar.linkDescription: Select text in the editor to add a link inline, or use Embed from the block list when the URL should render as media.
toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search lessons by title or description...

headingThree.label: Heading 3
headingThree.description: Add a smaller heading inside a subsection.

image.label: Image
image.description: Attach an image from cloud storage.

video.label: Video
video.description: Attach a video from cloud storage.

file.label: File / PDF
file.description: Attach a downloadable file or PDF preview.

pageBreak.label: Page break
pageBreak.description: Split the worksheet into a new page.

steps.label: Steps
steps.description: Show a sequence of steps with structure.

accordion.label: Accordion
accordion.description: Hide secondary content behind expandable items.

fileTag.title: Attach a cloud file
fileTag.description: Choose an existing file from cloud storage for this lesson block.
fileTag.emptyImage: Attach an image to show a visual here.
fileTag.emptyVideo: Attach a video to render it inline here.
fileTag.emptyFile: Attach a file or PDF to show it here.
fileTag.emptyResults: No matching cloud files are available yet.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved changes
unsavedChanges.description: You might lose changes if you switch tab or leave the page.
